promotion_policy: No row may be promoted without exact W70_MASK_PROMOTION_ROW_GATE_PASS_TRUE evidence and no unresolved user visual dispute.
generated_output_policy: Generated-output stability is output-geometry evidence only; it is not source-alignment proof.

records.target_definition: visible cheek-skin regions only; excludes nose, mouth, eyes, brows, hair, jaw/neck
compound expression regions must be split or explicitly bounded; broad face shortcut polygons fail closed
findings: broad expression-region masks require subpart decomposition before row promotion

records.target_definition: visible eyebrow hair bands only; excludes eyelids, forehead slabs, hair, eyes
visible lash-line strokes only; excludes eyelid skin and eye aperture
findings: lash-line masks require per-eye zoom and strand/lid boundary proof before promotion

records.target_definition: thin upper and lower eyelid bands only; excludes eye aperture, eyebrows, broad orbital skin, nose
visible full eye regions only; excludes broad orbital skin and eyebrows
visible face skin instance; excludes hair, background, neck, collar
findings: full-face instance requires source contour trace and hair/neck protected-boundary proof

records.target_definition: identity-critical visible face zones; excludes hair/background and must not be a broad shortcut polygon
findings: identity-critical region must be decomposed or source-contour-traced before promotion

records.target_definition: visible forehead skin between hairline and brows only
visible jawline and chin skin contour only; excludes neck/collar and mouth
source subject left eye / viewer-right visible eye region only
visible upper and lower lip surfaces; excludes philtrum, teeth, chin, cheeks
findings: current mouth/lips mask is not proven as full-region mouth/lip coverage by row-level zoom proof

records.target_definition: visible nose bridge, sidewalls, tip, alae, nostrils; excludes philtrum and lips
visible eye apertures containing pupil/iris/sclera per eye; excludes skin bands between eyes
findings: must be separated into per-eye apertures; a cross-face strip fails closed

records.target_definition: source subject right eye / viewer-left visible eye region only
explicit skin-tone continuity zones; broad whole-face/neck shortcuts fail closed
findings: skin-tone continuity requires subregion definitions and protected hair/neck exclusion proof

records.target_definition: visible teeth enamel strip only; excludes lips, tongue, inner mouth, skin
findings: teeth mask requires row-level zoom proof; full contact sheet is insufficient for promotion

records.target_definition: under-eye skin/tear-trough zones below lower lids; excludes eye apertures, nose bridge, broad cheek band
